title: What Kerala’s New Government Must Prioritise for Women?
description: The article examines the gap between Kerala’s welfare-oriented interventions for women and the persistent structural barriers affecting women’s political representation, labour force participation, institutional support, and economic agency. Drawing on recent election outcomes, policy developments, and research evidence, the article […] The post What Kerala’s New Government Must Prioritise for Women? appeared first on Centre for Public Policy Research (CPPR).
